description: Circuit constraint count thresholds. Increase only with justification in the PR description.

v1.reason: V1 stealth attestation circuit with 20-level Merkle tree, BabyJubJub ECDH, Poseidon hashing. Baseline ~50,000 constraints.

v2.reason: V2 stealth reputation circuit with 20-level Merkle tree, Poseidon hashing, schema binding. Baseline ~41,000 constraints.
